title: Maritime Projects Among European Hydrogen Bank Auction Bids
content: The European Hydrogen Bankâ€™s second auction for renewable hydrogen production has attracted 61 bids from projects in 11 European Economic Area (EEA) countries, eight of which were submitted under the dedicated maritime topic by hydrogen producers with off-takers in the maritime sector. Theâ€¯total grant support requested is more thanâ€¯â‚¬4.8 billion, four times the available budget of â‚¬1.2 billion provided by theâ€¯Innovation Fund. All bids together account for a total electrolyser capacity of around 6.3 Gigawatts (GWe). Over ten years, these projects would produce more than 7.3 million tonnes of renewable hydrogen. Every year, this would cover 7% of the EUâ€™s REPowerEU ambition for domestic renewable hydrogen production in 2030.
author: Analysts Account
